name: team-orbit-root
description: Team Orbit: Microservices desk booking platform

scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n gateway,directory,neighbourhood,booking,recommendation -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway-bff" "npm run dev --workspace=directory-service" "npm run dev --workspace=neighbourhood-service" "npm run dev --workspace=booking-service" "npm run dev --workspace=recommendation-service"
scripts.start:services: concurrently -n gateway,directory,neighbourhood,booking,recommendation -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue "npm run start --workspace=api-gateway-bff" "npm run start --workspace=directory-service" "npm run start --workspace=neighbourhood-service" "npm run start --workspace=booking-service" "npm run start --workspace=recommendation-service"
